_owner: TechBrot Inc. — Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor team
_methodology: One anonymized row is logged by the engaging ProAdvisor at the CLOSE of every completed QuickBooks migration engagement (Desktop->Online, platform switch, or version move). No client-identifying data is ever stored. Figures are observed, never estimated or modeled. The published page reports the live N and never reports a statistic on a cell with N<20 for that breakdown.

_schema.engagement_id: string — anonymous opaque id, no client linkage
_schema.from_platform: string — one of: qb-desktop, qb-enterprise, qb-premier, xero, wave, sage, spreadsheets, other
_schema.to_platform: string — one of: qbo, qb-enterprise, other
_schema.issues_found: array<string> — e.g. balances-off, lists-truncated, payroll-broke, inventory-mismatch, integrations-lost, ar-ap-detail-lost, sales-tax-reset, none
_schema.migration_hours: number — total ProAdvisor hours to a verified, reconciled migrated file
